headline: A Look At Intuitive Surgical’s Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance snapshot and business profile Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) has seen recent share price pressure, with a 3% one day decline and negative returns over the past week, month and past 3 months drawing fresh attention to its valuation. Despite this weaker near term performance, the company reports annual revenue of US$10.1b and net income of US$2.9b, reflecting a large established position in minimally invasive surgical technology.
